meta.poznamky: Rozhozené bloky pro: repeat(4){forward(60),right(90)}, penUp, forward(30), penDown, repeat(4){forward(60),right(90)}. Student skládá správné pořadí.

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]dva čtverce o straně 60 pixelů[/hlp] oddělené mezerou 30 pixelů.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1" x="300" y="20"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2" x="300" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1" x="20" y="220"></block><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2" x="300" y="220"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
